function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-10-06
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-10-06                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

next_step.current_state: Invoice migration write succeeded. Next required step per inbox rules is to remove processed inbox item; file was read earlier and task is fully completed.
next_step.observation: Structured frontmatter was written to the target invoice file without changing the original body content below it.

next_step.current_state: Completed inbox task end-to-end: loaded required policies/workflows/schemas, migrated the specified invoice to schema-compliant YAML frontmatter with exact body preservation, and deleted processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_next-task.md after successful completion of the requested structured-record maintenance task.

function.message: Done. I processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring `50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md` into YAML frontmatter using the finance invoice schema, preserved the existing note body verbatim below the frontmatter, and then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used workflow docs for inbox processing + OCR/migration, used schema-defined required invoice fields, preserved original body exactly during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR one invoice into YAML frontmatter per schema while preserving body text. The target invoice file contained all required invoice fields and line items visible in its body, allowing exact extraction without guessing. After writing the structured frontmatter and preserving the body, deleting `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` satisfied inbox completion rules.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to target invoice file
